message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Wohnen und Stadtentwicklung 1968","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3227","justification":"German survey on housing and urban development conducted in 1968; covers community and urban life as well as aspects of planning and land use within Germany during the 1960s."},{"title":"Stadtforschung Essen 1962","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3221","justification":"Urban research study focused on the city of Essen in 1962; addresses urban community conditions, housing, and local development in Germany in the 1960s."},{"title":"Gemeindeuntersuchung: Lebensverhältnisse in Gemeinden 1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.3239","justification":"Community-level survey of living conditions in German municipalities in 1969; directly related to community life and local development at the end of the 1960s."},{"title":"Raumplanung und Siedlungsstruktur in der Bundesrepublik 1963","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=0037","justification":"Study on spatial planning and settlement structure in the Federal Republic of Germany in 1963; centrally concerned with land use, planning, and urban-rural settlement patterns."},{"title":"Stadt-Umland-Beziehungen 1965","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=0390","justification":"Dataset on relationships between cities and their surrounding areas in West Germany, 1965; examines urban-rural linkages and aspects of planning and land use."},{"title":"Kommunalpolitik und Stadtentwicklung 1969","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=0415","justification":"Survey on local politics and urban development in German municipalities in 1969; highly relevant to community life, urban governance, and planning issues in the late 1960s."},{"title":"Wohnverhältnisse und Stadtstruktur in deutschen Großstädten 1964","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=0324","justification":"Study on housing conditions and urban structure in large German cities in 1964; addresses community and urban life, land use, and spatial structure."},{"title":"Ländliche Lebensformen und Agrarstruktur 1966","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=0452","justification":"Research on rural lifestyles and agricultural structures in West Germany in 1966; relevant to rural community life and land-use patterns in the countryside."},{"title":"Regionalplanung und Infrastruktur in deutschen Regionen 1967","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=0508","justification":"Dataset focused on regional planning and infrastructure in German regions in 1967; directly related to land use, planning, and spatial organization."},{"title":"Soziale Struktur und Entwicklung ländlicher Gemeinden 1968","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=0541","justification":"Survey of the social structure and development of rural municipalities in Germany in 1968; connects rural community life with local development and land-use change in the 1960s."}]}
